data.body:
DECISION RECORD — converged design from the design brainstorm (this epic rewritten + decomposed into 6 children).

PROVENANCE: a structured brainstorm + ~6 grounded web-research rounds (prior art on polyglot symbol resolution,
abstention semantics, hallucinated-symbol detection, detection-pattern storage/extensibility, and a buy-vs-build
sweep). Key sources: SARIF 2.1.0 (kind vocabulary), SMT-LIB unknown-with-reason, the Soundiness manifesto +
Google "effective false positives" (<10%), Monitor-Guided Decoding (NeurIPS 2023) + Type-Constrained Code Gen
(PLDI 2025) (LSP/type-checker = the authoritative symbol oracle), "We Have a Package for You!" (USENIX Sec 2025,
slopsquatting), Trivy/Sigma/golangci-lint/MegaLinter/Falco (registry + fail-open + applicability conventions),
OpenGrep (permissive LGPL-2.1 Semgrep fork), grep-ast/ctags/multilspy/SCIP, GitHub stack-graphs (ARCHIVED).

LOCKED DECISIONS:
1. PURE EVIDENCE ORACLE — returns evidence (outcome + structured reason + coverage); block/advisory policy is
   OUT OF SCOPE (owned by consumers). Separate candidate-generation (model, recall) from verification
   (deterministic, precision); the oracle is the verification side only.
2. THREE-VALUED, CONFIRM-ONLY — resolution lane returns `refuted` (disproved an asserted absence) or `abstain`,
   NEVER asserts absence ("can't prove absence; can disprove an asserted one"). Value = false-positive reduction.
3. FAIL-OPEN IS IRONCLAD — unsupported lang / missing tool / crash / timeout → abstain(reason) + recorded
   coverage; the visible skip IS the coverage record (never a silent no-op). Deliberate departure from the
   fail-CLOSED norm of every surveyed tool.
4. TIERS — v1 ships T0 (manifest/registry existence) + T1 (grep-ast/ctags repo-wide resolution), deterministic +
   polyglot. T2 (LSP/SCIP semantic resolution; containerized/Nix hermetic resolution) is DEFERRED to epic
   `850f-bf87-8600-4af6` (non-deterministic, server/build-bound; abstain-by-default seam in v1).
5. ENGINE B BACKEND = OpenGrep (reuse its rule-loading AS the registry substrate; fixes the Semgrep-rule
   licensing trap); ast-grep secondary; scc/lizard metric matcher. Detector format = thin envelope + verbatim
   native payload (Trivy model), NOT a cross-compiler. Built-in + project-local `.rebar/detectors/`; namespaced
   IDs; last-wins override; self-declared applicability (= the deterministic overlay trigger).
6. BUY-VS-BUILD = BUILD a thin integration over reused backends. No reusable WHOLE exists; the gap is BENIGN
   (posture inversion: everyone else is closed-SaaS, verdict-emitting, fail-closed, FP-minimizing; + recency;
   + pieces mature, only integration+contract novel). Rejected MegaLinter/Super-Linter/pre-commit as Engine B
   (CI runners, fail-closed, not embeddable). Avoid stack-graphs (archived).
7. DISTRIBUTION v1 = built-in + project-local `.rebar/detectors/` only; shareable rule-pack registry/lockfile
   DEFERRED. Detector discovery owned here; file convention COORDINATED with `55de` (config tool/UX). NOT a
   duplicate of `3156` (project-supplied LLM criteria — a different, semantic layer).
8. OPTIONAL & NON-IMPACTING — optional extra; core import-clean (optionality CI gate); a non-adopting client
   imports nothing and pays nothing. Polyglot, not Python-indexed (tree-sitter tags; purl ecosystems; multi-
   framework web detection; detector `languages` field).

DECOMPOSITION (6 children; S1 is the dependency root):
- S1 helm-cabin-graze  — evidence contract + fail-open harness + optional-extra scaffolding.
- S2 murky-golly-shrew — Engine A refutation resolver (grep-ast/ctags T1) + reference-in schema.  [dep S1]
- S3 young-hood-notch  — T0 dependency/package existence (manifest + purl registries + abstain gauntlet). [dep S1]
- S4 pewter-scat-slag  — Engine B detector registry + OpenGrep evaluator (+ast-grep/metrics). [dep S1]
- S5 saggy-easel-yarn  — public oracle API (3 query surfaces) + consumer contract + docs. [dep S2,S3,S4]
- S6 webby-vane-son    — fail-open conformance suite + polyglot fixtures + non-adoption test. [dep S2,S3,S4]

CONSUMERS: `5fd2` DET floor (P2/P3/P4) and `9da1` Pass-2 grounding depend_on this epic — one implementation,
not two. T2 follow-on `850f` depends_on this epic's seam.
